sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Na sepna lian bel sem dingin lawm aw zekai ke’n,
Na hih ding ngeina om bangin thupha omsak in,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Na omna munah tangsak in, Na omna munah tangsak in.
A kisia ding a om mi

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Na kiimah huh theih ding lunggim
Nangma ang sung ding bek khual kei in;
Na lasak bekin zong a dahte hehnem thei

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Lai Siangtho simin, Topa in hong makaih ding
Na mawhna mai khaksak kei in;
Topa na theihna na mai suah tawh kitheisak in,
